title: poa × poppelwellii
intro: Poa × poppelwellii, also known as New Zealand poa, is a hybrid grass species derived from the Poa annua and Poa infirma species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa × poppelwellii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and possessing potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to alleviate various health conditions.
